member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Cache.CacheOptions.UseLegacyWebReportCache
member.summary: Use legacy WebReport cache instead of . Default value: true

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Cache.CacheOptions.UseCircuitScope
member.summary:
Enables WebReport cache management based on the user's in Blazor Server mode.
When enabled, the WebReport lifetime follows the user's session and settings such as , and .
member.remarks: If a user selects a different WebReport during the same session, the previous report is immediately removed from the cache. Similarly, when the user closes the browser tab or disconnects, the associated WebReport is promptly removed.

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Cache.IWebReportCache
member.summary: Represents the cache where all webReports will be stored

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Cache.WebReportCache
member.summary: For backward compatibility

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Cache.WebReportCacheOptions.CacheDuration
member.summary: Reports' lifetime in cache. If report is not used the specified time and there is no references to the object, it will be deleted from cache. Default value: 15 minutes.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Cache.WebReportCacheOptions.AbsoluteExpirationDuration
member.summary: The absolute lifetime of a report in the cache. Unlike , which specifies a sliding expiration policy, this property defines the maximum amount of time a report can exist in the cache, regardless of activity or references. If not specified, the cache entry will rely solely on the sliding expiration defined by .

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Cache.WebReportCacheOptions.AbsoluteExpiration
member.summary: Specifies the exact expiration date and time for the report in the cache. When both and are specified, the earlier of the two values determines when the cache entry expires. If not set, the cache entry will rely on either the sliding expiration defined by or the absolute lifetime defined by .

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Cache.WebReportLegacyCache
member.summary: Legacy WebReportCache implementation

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Dialog.DatePickerFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets date format in html input type="date"

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Dialog.TimePickerFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets time format in html input type="time"

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.LocalizationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the WebReport's locale

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.CacheOptions
member.summary: Specifies individual cache settings for the current WebReport. These settings have the highest priority over other cache configurations. Default value: null. ///

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.RemoveFromCache
member.summary: Force report to be removed from internal cache

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ID
member.summary: Unique ID of this instance. Automatically generates on creation.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Inline
member.summary: Adds "display: inline-*" to html container. Default value: true.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.PageBorderVisible
member.summary: Disable or enable the box-shadow style for the report page.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Report
member.summary: Current report

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.CurrentPageIndex
member.summary: Page index of current report

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ReportPrepared
member.summary: Is current report prepared(.fpx) or not(.frx)

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.TotalPages
member.summary: Total prepared pages of current report

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Mode
member.summary: Switches between Preview and Designer modes

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.UserData
member.summary: Property to store user data

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Toolbar
member.summary: Toolbar settings

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ToolbarHeight
member.summary: Toolbar height in pixels

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Outline
member.summary: Shows sidebar with outline. Default value: true.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.SetLocalization(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Sets WebReport localization using

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.NextPage
member.summary: Force go to next report page

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.PrevPage
member.summary: Force go to previous report page

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.FirstPage
member.summary: Force go to first report page

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.LastPage
member.summary: Force go to last report page

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.GotoPage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Force go to "value" report page

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ReportSearch(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Forced transition to the report page containing the required text.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowPreparedReport
member.summary: Switch a visibility of prepared report export in toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowPdfExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of PDF (Adobe Acrobat) export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowExcel2007Export
member.summary: Switches a visibility of Excel 2007 export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowWord2007Export
member.summary: Switches a visibility of Word 2007 export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowPowerPoint2007Export
member.summary: Switches a visibility of PowerPoint 2007 export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowTextExport
member.summary: Switch a visibility of text (plain text) export in toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowRtfExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of RTF export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowXpsExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of XPS export in toolbar.

member.summary: Switches a visibility of Open Office Spreadsheet (ODS) export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowOdtExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of Open Office Text (ODT) export in toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowXmlExcelExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of XML (Excel) export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowDbfExport
member.summary: Switches a visibility of DBF export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowCsvExport
member.summary: Switches visibility the CSV (comma separated values) export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowMhtExport
member.summary: Switches visibility the MHT export in toolbar.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.CurrentTab
member.summary: Active report tab

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.CurrentTabIndex
member.summary: Active tab index

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.SplitReportPagesInTabs
member.summary: Shows different ReportPage in tabs. Default value: false.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ShowReportNameInTab
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the report name is displayed in the tab. If set to true, the tab will display the report name. If false, it will display report parameters. Default value: false.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Tabs
member.summary: List of report tabs

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.WebReport.SplitReportPagesByTabs
member.summary: Add report pages in tabs after load report

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.Designer
member.summary: Designer settings

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignScriptCode
member.summary: Enable code editor in the Report Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignerPath
member.summary: Gets or sets path to the Report Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignerSavePath
member.summary: Gets or sets path to a folder for save designed reports If value is empty then designer posts saved report in variable ReportFile on call the DesignerSaveCallBack // TODO

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignerSaveCallBack
member.summary: Gets or sets path to callback page after Save from Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignerSaveMethod
member.summary: Callback method for saving an edited report by Online Designer Params: reportID, report file name, report, out - message

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ReportName
member.summary: Report name without extension

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.ReportFileName
member.summary: Report file name with extension (*.frx)

member.summary: Gets or sets the locale of Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.DesignerConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets the text of configuration of Online Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReport.RequestHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets the request headers

member.summary: Occurs when designed report save is started.

member.summary: Runs on designed report save

member.summary: For internal use only.

member.summary: Enable or disable the breaks between pages in print preview when single page mode is enabled

member.summary: Enable or disable the pictures in HTML export

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.BlazorExport.EmbedPictures
member.summary: Enable or disable embedding pictures in HTML export

member.summary: Enable or disable the single HTML page creation

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.BlazorExport.ImageFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the image format.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.BlazorExport.EnableMargins
member.summary: Enable or disable margins for pages.

member.summary: Process Page with number p and real page ReportPage

member.summary: Process Page with number p and real page ReportPage

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.BlazorExport.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.BlazorPageData.Guids
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: F:FastReport.Web.Blazor.Export.ClickType.Empty
member.summary: Default value of .

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerOptions.AllowCustomSqlQueries
member.summary:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether custom SQL queries can be executed. When set to true, users will be able to specify custom table names and SQL expressions during the database structure loading process.
WARNING: Enabling this option may pose security risks.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerOptions.EnableIntelliSense
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Intellisense is enabled. When set to true, Intellisense feature will be enabled in the application.
member.remarks: WARNING: Enabling Intellisense requires returning class information from the assembly.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerOptions.IntelliSenseAssemblies
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of assemblies needed for IntelliSense highlighting.
member.remarks: The assemblies listed here will be used to provide class information for IntelliSense highlighting.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerOptions.OnWebReportCreated
member.summary: Callback that is invoked after a new is created from the Online Designer. Allows customizing or configuring the report before it is rendered or processed further.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerOptions.OnWebReportCreatedAsync
member.summary: Asynchronous callback that is invoked after a new is created from the Online Designer. Allows customizing or configuring the report before it is rendered or processed further.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.Locale
member.summary: Gets or sets the locale of Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.ScriptCode
member.summary: Enable code editor in the Report Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.Config
member.summary: Gets or sets the json of configuration of Online Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets path to the Report Designer

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.SaveMethod
member.summary: Callback method for saving an edited report by Online Designer Params: reportID, report file name, report, out - message

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.SaveMethodAsync
P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.SavePath
member.summary: Gets or sets path to a folder for save designed reports If value is empty then designer posts saved report in variable ReportFile on call the DesignerSaveCallBack // TODO

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.DesignerSettings.SaveCallBack
member.summary: Gets or sets path to callback page after Save from Designer

member.summary: Used to set exports in toolbar.

member.summary: Used to change font family, style in export settings.

member.summary: Used to change font color in export settings.

member.summary: Used to change window, buttons color in export settings.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ExportMenuSettings.EnableSettings
member.summary: Used to on/off export settings.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ExportMenuSettings.PinnedSettingsPosition
member.summary: If enabled, the container with the settings will be fixed on the screen and will be in the foreground.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ExportMenuSettings.Default
member.summary:
Get an instance of ExportMenuSettings with default exports
Default : Prepared, Pdf, Excel2007, Word2007, Text, Rtf, Xps, Ods, Odt, XmlExcel, Csv

member.summary: Get an instance of ExportMenuSettings with all exports

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Exports
member.summary: Used to select exports

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.FastReportOptions.RoutePathBaseRoot
member.summary: Request.PathBase url for API. Default value: "".

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.FastReportOptions.RouteBasePath
member.summary: Request.Path part of url for API. Default value: "/_fr".

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.FastReportOptions.Authorize
member.summary: A function that determines who can access API. It should return true when the request client has access, false for a 401 to be returned. HttpRequest parameter is the current request.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.FastReportOptions.CacheDuration
member.summary: Reports' lifetime in minutes. If report is not used the specified time and there is no references to the object, it will be deleted from cache. Default value: "15".

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.ToolbarLocalization.#ctor
member.summary: Default toolbar localization

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.ToolbarLocalization.#ctor(FastReport.Web.Application.IWebRes)
member.summary: Localized toolbar items

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.Exports
member.summary: ExportMenu settings

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.ShowPrint
member.summary: Show Print menu

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.Sticky
member.summary: If enabled, the toolbar will follow the scrolling of the report.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.Color
member.summary: Use to change ToolbarColor, Default value Color.WhiteSmoke

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.DropDownMenuColor
member.summary: Use to change Toolbar DropDownMenuColor, Default value Color.White

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.DropDownMenuTextColor
member.summary: Use to change Toolbar DropDownMenuText Color, Default value Color.Black

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.Position
member.summary: Use to change Toolbar Position in report, Default value Position.Top

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.Roundness
member.summary: Use to add Roundness to Toolbar, Default value RoundnessEnum.High

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.ContentPosition
member.summary: Use to change content position in Toolbar, Default value ContentPositions.Center

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.IconColor
member.summary: Use to change Icons color in Toolbar, Default value IconColors.Black

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.IconTransperency
member.summary: Use to add Transparency in icon Toolbar, Default value IconTransparencyEnum.None

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.FontSettings
member.summary:
Use to change Font in Toolbar, Default value null
Example syntax : new Font("Arial", 14 , FontStyle.Bold)

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.SearchHighlight
member.summary: Use to change search highlight, Default value Color.Yellow

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.ToolbarSettings.InsertToolbarElement(FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement)
member.summary: Adds an item to the toolbar
member.param: Any inheritor of ToolbarElement. Can be a TolbarButton, ToolbarSelect, or ToolbarInput

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarButton
member.summary: Button for the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarButton.Image
member.summary: The image of the button that appears in the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarButton.OnClickAction
member.summary: Action that is triggered when the button is clicked

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.Name
member.summary: Name of button required to interact with the element list

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.Enabled
member.summary: Defines the visibility of the button on the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.ElementCustomStyle
member.summary: Element styles to be specified in the style tag

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.ElementClasses
member.summary: Classes to be specified in the class tag for the element

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.Title
member.summary: Text to be displayed when the element is hovered over

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElement.Position
member.summary: Property by which the buttons in the toolbar will be sorted

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.IClickAction
member.summary: Action that is triggered when the element is clicked

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.IChangeAction
member.summary: Action that is triggered when the element is changed

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementScript
member.summary: A script that is called when you click on element

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementScript.Script
member.summary: A script that is called when you click on element

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementClickAction
member.summary: Action that is called when you click on an item

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementClickAction.OnClickAction
member.summary: Action that is called when you click on an item. WebReport - WebReport for which the button is made

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementChangeAction
member.summary: Action that is called when item changed

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ElementChangeAction.OnChangeAction
member.summary: Action that is called when item changed. WebReport - WebReport for which the button is mad

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElementImage
member.summary: The image that will be displayed in the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElementImage.Base64
member.summary: Toolbar element image in Base64 format

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarElementImage.Url
member.summary: Link to the image of the toolbar element

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarInput
member.summary: Input field for the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarInput.InputType
member.summary: Type of input, which is specified in the type tag

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarInput.InputCustomStyle
member.summary: Styles that are specified in the style tag for input

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarInput.InputDefaultValue
member.summary: Standard value for input

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarInput.OnChangeAction
member.summary:
Action to be triggered when user changes input value
Can be either ElementScript or ElementChangeAction

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelect
member.summary: Element that opens a drop-down list when you hover over it

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelect.Image
member.summary: The image of the button that appears in the toolbar

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelect.Items
member.summary:
Contains items that will be displayed in the drop-down list
List of ToolbarSelectItems

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelectItem
member.summary: The element that appears in the drop-down list

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelectItem.Name
member.summary: Name of toolbar item required to interact with the items list

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelectItem.Title
member.summary: The inscription displayed in the drop-down list

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelectItem.Enabled
member.summary: Defines the visibility of the item in the drop-down list

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.Toolbar.ToolbarSelectItem.OnClickAction
member.summary: Action that is triggered when the item is clicked

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.CacheOptions
member.summary: Contains settings that define how reports are cached, including storage duration and caching strategy.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.EmailExportOptions
member.summary: SMTP server settings for sending the report by e-mail

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.Designer
member.summary: Provides options related to the Online Report Designer configuration and behavior.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.AllowCustomSqlQueries
member.summary:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether custom SQL queries can be executed. When set to true, users will be able to specify custom table names and SQL expressions during the database structure loading process.
WARNING: Enabling this option may pose security risks.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.EnableOnlineDesignerIntelliSense
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Intellisense is enabled. When set to true, Intellisense feature will be enabled in the application.
member.remarks: WARNING: Enabling Intellisense requires returning class information from the assembly.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions.IntelliSenseAssemblies
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of assemblies needed for IntelliSense highlighting.
member.remarks: The assemblies listed here will be used to provide class information for IntelliSense highlighting.

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.SaveDesignedReportEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for Save report from Designer

member.name: F:FastReport.Web.SaveDesignedReportEventArgs.Stream
member.summary: Contain the stream with designed report

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService
member.summary: Interface for working with connections. Allows to get connection string properties, connected tables, connection types and create a connection string.
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetConnectionStringPropertiesJSON(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Returns JSON string of connection string properties.
member.param: Out variable, which helps to determine if an error is returned
member.returns: Returns JSON string with connection string properties. If an error is detected, it returns the error text.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.CreateConnectionStringJSON(System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormCollection,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Create connection string and returns json with this connection string
member.param: Out variable, which helps to determine if an error is returned
member.returns: Returns JSON with сonnection string. If an error is detected, it returns the error text.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetConnectionTables(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{FastReport.Web.Services.CustomViewModel})
member.summary: Returns the list of connected tables by connection type and connection string
member.param: Returns a bool variable which means whether the error is returned or not
member.returns: Returns JSON with connected tables

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetConnectionTables(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{FastReport.Web.Services.CustomViewModel})
member.summary: Returns the list of connected tables by connection type and connection string
member.returns: Returns JSON with connected tables

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetUpdatedTableByReportId(FastReport.Web.WebReport,FastReport.Web.Services.UpdateTableParams)
member.summary: Updates a table within a web report based on the provided parameters.
member.param: The WebReport object containing the table to be updated.
The parameters specifying the table name, SQL query, and update parameters.
member.returns: A string representation of the updated table.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetUpdatedTableByConnectionString(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String,System.String,FastReport.Web.Services.UpdateTableParams)
member.summary: Updates a table within a database using the provided connection string and parameters.
member.param: The WebReport object containing the table to be updated.
The connection string to the database.
The parameters specifying the table name, SQL query, and update parameters.
member.returns: A string representation of the updated table.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetConnectionTypes(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the list of connection types

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IConnectionsService.GetParameterTypes(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Returns the list of parameter types by connection type.

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService
member.summary: The interface that provides utilities for the Online Designer. Allows to get MsChart Template, component properties and report functions
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetMSChartTemplateXML(System.String)
member.summary: Searches for a template by name and returns an XML string with that template
member.param: Name of the template. Like Blue, Black, etc.
member.returns: Returns the XML string with the MsChart template. If the template is not found, it returns null

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetPropertiesJSON(System.String)
member.summary: Returns JSON string of connection string properties.
member.param: The FastReport component whose properties you want to get. Like TextObject, PictureObject etc.
member.returns: Returns JSON string with FastReport component properties. If the component is not found - returns null

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetFunctions(FastReport.Report)
member.summary: Retrieves the report functions and returns them to string
member.param: Report, the functions of which are to be obtained
member.returns: Returns a string with the report functions

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetConfig(FastReport.Web.WebReport)
member.summary: Returns the Online Designer configuration
member.param: WebReport configuration of which is to be returned
member.returns: String in JSON format with configuration for Online Designer

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.DesignerObjectPreview(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a designer object preview.
member.returns: Returns a string representing the designer object preview.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetClassDetailsJson(System.String)
member.summary: Gets class details in JSON format.
member.returns: Returns class details in JSON format.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IDesignerUtilsService.GetNamespacesInfoJson(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String})
member.summary: Gets namespaces information in JSON format.
member.returns: Returns namespaces information in JSON format.

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IExportsService
member.summary: Interface for using the export service. Allows you to export a report and get the export settings window.
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IExportsService.ExportReport(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}[],System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Exports the report in a specified format with specified parameters and returns an array of bytes - the exported report file
member.param: The FastReport component whose properties you want to get. Like TextObject, PictureObject etc.
member.returns: Returns an array of bytes - the exported report. Returns null if there is an error.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IExportsService.GetExportSettings(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String)
member.summary: Searches the settings window by format name and returns an HTML string with a modal settings container.
member.param: Report, for which the export settings are using
member.returns: Returns an HTML string with the export settings container of the selected format. If the format is not found, it returns an empty string.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IExportsService.ExportEmail(FastReport.Web.WebReport,FastReport.Web.EmailExportParams)
member.summary: Creates an email export, assigns parameters to it and sends the email

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IPrintService
member.summary: Interface for printing the report.
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IPrintService.PrintReport(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String)
member.summary: Prints report
member.returns: Returns an array of bytes depending on the print mode. File to print from browser if print mode is "html" and pdf file if print mode is "pdf"

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportDesignerService
member.summary: Interface for interacting with reports. Allows you to design and save WebReport
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

members.member:
Asynchronously returns a report preview string for Online Designer
WebReport preview of which you want to return /// Request body with report Cancellation Token

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportDesignerService.SaveReportAsync(FastReport.Web.WebReport,FastReport.Web.Services.SaveReportServiceParams,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: A method for saving the report
member.returns: Returns the object with the response

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportDesignerService.GetDesignerReport(FastReport.Web.WebReport)
member.summary: Returns the report for Online Designer
member.param: WebReport to be displayed in the designer
member.returns: Returns the report string for Online Designer

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportDesignerService.GetPOSTReportStringAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously returns a string with the report
member.returns: String with the report

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportDesignerService.CreateReport(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a report with provided report stream
member.returns: WebReport Id

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService
member.summary: Interface for interacting with reports. Allows you to preview and search WebReport
member.remarks: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService.GetReportAsync(FastReport.Web.WebReport,FastReport.Web.Services.GetReportServiceParams,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously returns a report for Preview on the Web
member.param: Report a preview of which you want to create
member.returns: Returns the HTML string of the report preview

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService.TryFindWebReport(System.String,FastReport.Web.WebReport@)
member.summary: Finds the report by ID
member.param: The ID of the report you want to find
member.returns: WebReport

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService.SearchText(FastReport.Web.WebReport,FastReport.Web.Services.ReportSearchParams)
member.summary: Forced transition to the report page containing the required text
member.param: The report that is being searched for
member.returns: Returns a flag that determines whether the text you are looking for has been found

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService.Touch(System.String)
member.summary: Touches the report to reset its sliding expiration in the cache.
member.param: The unique identifier of the report.
member.returns: true if a report with the provided ID was found; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IReportService.InvokeCustomElementAction(FastReport.Web.WebReport,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the report after clicking on an element with id = elementId
member.param: Report to which the action applies
member.returns: Updated WebReport

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.IResourceLoader
member.summary: Loads necessary WebReport resources such as toolbar images, scripts and other

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IResourceLoader.GetContent(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the requested UTF8 string representation resource.
member.returns: A UTF8 string representation resource. If the resource is not found - returns null

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IResourceLoader.GetContentAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously returns the requested UTF8 string representation resource.
member.returns: A UTF8 string representation resource. If the resource is not found - returns null

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IResourceLoader.GetBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the requested resource as byte array.
member.returns: Byte array of requested resource. If the resource is not found - returns null

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.IResourceLoader.GetBytesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously returns the requested resource as byte array.
member.returns: Byte array of requested resource. If the resource is not found - returns null

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.ITextEditService
member.summary: The interface may change over time

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.Services.ITextEditService.GetTemplateTextEditForm(System.String,FastReport.Web.WebReport)
member.summary: Returns a string with template text edit form

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.Services.InternalResourceLoader
member.summary: Internal implementation of . Loads requested resources from embedded resources of the current assembly

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions
member.summary: SMTP server options for sending the report by mail

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.EnableSSL
member.summary: Determines whether to enable the SSL protocol.
member.remarks: The default value for this property is false.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Username
member.summary: SMTP account username.
member.remarks: Specify the and properties if your host requires authentication.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.MessageTemplate
member.summary: Template that will be used to create a new message.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Name
member.summary: The name that will appear next to the address from which the e-mail is sent.
member.remarks: This property contains your name (for example, "John Smith").

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Host
member.summary: SMTP host name or IP address.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Address
member.summary: The address from which the e-mail will be sent

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Password
member.summary: SMTP server password.
member.remarks: Specify the and properties if your host requires authentication.

member.name: P:FastReport.Web.EmailExportOptions.Port
member.summary: SMTP port.
member.remarks: The default value for this property is 25.

member.name: T:FastReport.Web.IScriptChecker
member.summary: Interface for overriding the standard check of the report script

member.name: M:FastReport.Web.IScriptChecker.IsValid(FastReport.Language,System.String,System.String[],FastReport.Report)
member.summary: Method for checking the report script
member.returns: Returns true if the report passed the validation check

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.FastReportServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFastReport(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds FastReport services to the specified Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.FastReportServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFastReport(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{FastReport.Web.WebReportOptions})
member.summary: Adds FastReport services to the specified Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection
